name: Spicy Apple Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend butter, sugar, egg, flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, chopped nuts, and water together until a dough forms.
2. Stir in the diced apples.
3. Place the mixture into a 6-cup ring mold.
4. Microwave on 50% power for 10 minutes.
5. Switch to high power and cook for an additional 2½ to 3½ minutes.
6. Carefully unmold after 3 to 5 minutes.
Serves: 6 - 8
Fat per serving: 11.4 grams
